notes: B0010.r38 display and Wi-Fi stability candidate. Uses a dedicated static OTA cover, permits foreground scans while connected with HTTPS/radio exclusion, reconstructs DHCP/DNS/clock/HTTPS status, disables C6 Wi-Fi power save where supported, and shows a hysteretic full-width poor-signal/offline header warning. Retains ten saved profiles, strongest-known-network recovery, full-file SHA-256, six-second P4/C6 stabilization, C6 ESP-Hosted 2.12.9, NO DATA gating and sensor-expiry reminders.
